**[Note 3758792 by HellMap: "New solar farm being constructed around here. The location description is very vague in the article, but it's near Virši DUS. Given the size (5600 panels, about 6 soccer fields), it's probably here. Some works are ongoing at least near the highway North, although may be unrelated.

https://buvinzenierusavieniba.lv/izbuve-lidz-sim-lielako-saules-elektrostaciju-siguldas-novada/"](https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3758792)**
Contributor: HellMap
Action: opened
Comment: New solar farm being constructed around here. The location description is very vague in the article, but it's near Virši DUS. Given the size (5600 panels, about 6 soccer fields), it's probably here. Some works are ongoing at least near the highway North, although may be unrelated.

https://buvinzenierusavieniba.lv/izbuve-lidz-sim-lielako-saules-elektrostaciju-siguldas-novada/
https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3758792

RSS (Jun 30 2023 at 18:08):

**[Note 3758773 by HellMap: "The area is fenced off for a while now, but the construction is only starting now. Foundation to be built by start of October when the main wheel is to get mounted. Unclear if it's going to get finished in 2023 but doubtful. All paths still lead to this place, but are blocked off by fences. New path layout is unclear.

https://buvinzenierusavieniba.lv/drizuma-saks-rigas-panoramas-rata-pamatu-buvniecibu/"](https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3758773)**
Contributor: HellMap
Action: opened
Comment: The area is fenced off for a while now, but the construction is only starting now. Foundation to be built by start of October when the main wheel is to get mounted. Unclear if it's going to get finished in 2023 but doubtful. All paths still lead to this place, but are blocked off by fences. New path layout is unclear.

https://buvinzenierusavieniba.lv/drizuma-saks-rigas-panoramas-rata-pamatu-buvniecibu/

**[Note 3812970 by richlv: "This node is likely wrongly classified as a memorial currently.
I mapped it as a locality, because the yard was informally named like that.
This also suggests that the name translations are incorrect.

The yard is now fenced and closed to public, thus the name might even fade in the future.

Creating this note for myself to clean it up one day.

https://www.openstreetmap.org/node/3770061397/history"](https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3812970)**
Contributor: richlv
Action: opened
Comment: This node is likely wrongly classified as a memorial currently.
I mapped it as a locality, because the yard was informally named like that.
This also suggests that the name translations are incorrect.

The yard is now fenced and closed to public, thus the name might even fade in the future.

Creating this note for myself to clean it up one day.

https://www.openstreetmap.org/node/3770061397/history
https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3812970

Note 3849513 by HellMap: "Ambiguous living zone. Lacks one or more signs around this location. Entering from North by Zaļā iela doesn't have any signs, but entering East by Bērzu has living zone signage. Courtyards and roads North are signed, but not the ones South and East. So, logically, a sign would be at this intersection. Recent road works around here, so possibly all signs are yet to be installed. But likely need to ask Council."
Contributor: HellMap
Action: opened
Comment: Ambiguous living zone. Lacks one or more signs around this location. Entering from North by Zaļā iela doesn't have any signs, but entering East by Bērzu has living zone signage. Courtyards and roads North are signed, but not the ones South and East. So, logically, a sign would be at this intersection. Recent road works around here, so possibly all signs are yet to be installed. But likely need to ask Council.
https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3849513

RSS (Nov 04 2023 at 12:09):

Note 3972166 by richlv: "This was previously included in the named allotment territory, is excluded now. One problem is that preserving the named territory is useful on its own (for example, this could affect neighbouring property assssments etc). The other - there seems to be a small building there, and from the imagery it's not clear whether the plants there might be orchard + some berry bushes or not - it might be worth including this in the allotment area unless/until survey would show it absolutely not being one (but then we're back to problem one)."
Contributor: richlv
Action: opened
Comment: This was previously included in the named allotment territory, is excluded now.
One problem is that preserving the named territory is useful on its own (for example, this could affect neighbouring property assssments etc).
The other - there seems to be a small building there, and from the imagery it's not clear whether the plants there might be orchard + some berry bushes or not - it might be worth including this in the allotment area unless/until survey would show it absolutely not being one (but then we're back to problem one).
https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3972166

RSS (Nov 04 2023 at 12:09):

Note 3972165 by richlv: "This has been changed from allotments to residential and excluded from the named allotment territory. Would be great to preserve the full original allotment territory with the name, though, as that is both useful in general and something users would expect when looking at a map. Not sure how to best do it, though."
Contributor: richlv
Action: opened
Comment: This has been changed from allotments to residential and excluded from the named allotment territory.
Would be great to preserve the full original allotment territory with the name, though, as that is both useful in general and something users would expect when looking at a map.
Not sure how to best do it, though.
https://www.openstreetmap.org/note/3972165
